raw_description: My product is CrabRes (crabres.com), an AI growth strategy agent for indie hackers and vibe coders. It helps any product find users by researching competitors, validating product direction, and creating detailed growth plans with ready-to-use content. Currently 0 users, $0 budget (only time investment), target: 500 users in 3 months. Markets: global (English + Chinese). I want to build in public. Give me the most detailed, specific, and creative growth plan possible — not generic advice, but exactly what to post, where, when, and the actual content.
